scope.trainer_snapshot_contract: consistent SQLite backup opened mode=ro&immutable=1; never point the harness at a live mutable DB
scope.full_measurement_command: python3 measure_coverage_v2.py --trainer-db SNAPSHOT/eta_calib.db --gps-delivery SNAPSHOT/gps_delivery_truth.jsonl --restaurant-dwell SNAPSHOT/restaurant_dwell.json --courier-ground-truth SNAPSHOT/courier_ground_truth.json --as-of SNAPSHOT_TIME

decision_outcomes_sanity_source.warning: used only to demonstrate material courier mismatch; not the trainer denominator

courier_filter_sanity_only.warning: decision_outcomes is not the eta_calib trainer denominator; these counts must not adjust 1805

reclassified_legacy_measurement.reason: no trainer-courier equality check; 2109 and 1805 are different populations

corrected_trainer_coverage.required_predicate: same order_id AND canonical-normalized trainer courier_id == source courier_id AND high confidence AND valid timestamp/as_of

pickup_proxy_coverage.required_predicate: same courier, _source=gps_geofence, n_in>=2, inside radius, last_inside<=as_of

model_effect.reason: target replacement changes empirical and LGBM fits, courier pace history, conformal offsets and predictions outside replaced rows; coverage is not a quality ceiling
